steps.screen:
[23CIt is written in the Book of Thoth:

[27CAfter the Creation, the cruel god Moloch rebelled
[27Cagainst the authority of Marduk the Creator.
[27CMoloch stole from Marduk the most powerful of all
[27Cthe artifacts of the gods, the Amulet of Yendor,
[27Cand he hid it in the dark cavities of Gehennom, the
[27CUnder World, where he now lurks, and bides his time.

[23CYour god Thoth seeks to possess the Amulet, and with it
[23Cto gain deserved ascendance over the other gods.

[23CYou, a newly trained Evoker, have been heralded
[23Cfrom birth as the instrument of Thoth.  You are destined
[23Cto recover the Amulet for your deity, or die in the
[23Cattempt.  Your hour of destiny has come.  For the sake
[23Cof us all:  Go bravely with Thoth!
[23C--More--
